key_points.text: Compute Networking revenue reached $193.5 billion in fiscal 2026, up 67% year-over-year, driven by accelerated computing and AI platforms, with Data Center computing revenue growing 59% from Blackwell platform demand.

citation.quote: Revenue from Data Center computing grew 59% driven by demand for our Blackwell computing platform

key_points.text: Data Center networking revenue surged 142% year-over-year, driven by NVLink compute fabric for GB200/GB300 systems and growth in Ethernet and InfiniBand platforms.

citation.quote: Revenue from Data Center networking grew 142% driven by the introduction and continued ramp of NVLink compute fabric for GB200 and GB300 systems

key_points.text: Ecosystem strength evidenced by over 7.5 million developers worldwide using CUDA and NVIDIA software tools, with technology available from virtually every major server maker and CSP.

citation.quote: There are over 7.5 million developers worldwide using CUDA and our other software tools

key_points.text: Q1 FY2027 (ended April 26, 2026) Compute Networking segment revenue reached $74.6 billion with operating income of $53.3 billion, up 88% and 142% respectively from Q1 FY2026.

citation.quote: Revenue $ 74,550... Operating income $ 53,335... Three Months Ended Apr 27, 2025... Revenue $ 39,589... Operating income $ 22,054

key_points.text: Total revenue in fiscal 2026 reached $215.9 billion, up 65% year-over-year from $130.5 billion in fiscal 2025, with operating income increasing 58% to $139.3 billion.

citation.quote: Year Ended Jan 25, 2026 Revenue $ 215,938... Year Ended Jan 26, 2025 Revenue $ 130,497

key_points.text: Graphics segment revenue grew 57% to $22.5 billion in fiscal 2026, driven by Blackwell architecture sales, with operating income up 80% to $9.2 billion.

citation.quote: Graphics revenue... The year over year increase was driven by sales of our Blackwell architecture

key_points.text: Launched NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra platform optimized for agentic, reasoning, and physical AI, delivering significant increase in token throughput and reduction in cost per token compared to Hopper generation.

citation.quote: In fiscal year 2026, we launched and scaled the NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra platform, optimized for agentic, reasoning, and physical AI

key_points.text: Rubin platform announced and expected to commence production shipments in H2 FY2027, built for agentic AI and reasoning with up to 10x reduction in cost per token compared to Blackwell.

citation.quote: In fiscal year 2026, we unveiled the NVIDIA Rubin platform, which is expected to commence production shipments in the second half of fiscal year 2027... delivering up to a 10x reduction in cost per token compared to Blackwell

key_points.text: Increased quarterly cash dividend from $0.01 per share to $0.25 per share as of May 18, 2026, signaling confidence in cash generation and shareholder value.

citation.quote: On May 18, 2026, we increased our quarterly cash dividend from $ 0.01 per share to $ 0.25 per share
